mapper.select: SELECT place_id FROM place WHERE place_id = TO_NUMBER(#{apiContentId}) AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLACE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO place ( place_id, partner_id, place_name, category, address, latitude, longitude, phone_number, description, image_url, createdtime ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, 0, #{placeName}, #{category}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{phoneNumber}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO place ( place_id, partner_id, place_name, category, address, latitude, longitude, phone_number, description, image_url, createdtime ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, 0, #{placeName}, #{category}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{phoneNumber}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )
MERGE INTO accommodation a USING DUAL ON (a.place_id = #{placeId}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (place_id, checkintime, checkouttime) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{checkintime}, #{checkouttime})
mapper.select: SELECT place_id AS placeId, place_name AS placeName, address AS address, latitude AS latitude, longitude AS longitude, category AS category, image_url AS imageUrl, phone_number AS phoneNumber, description AS description FROM place WHERE ( UPPER(place_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(address) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN image_url IS NOT NULL AND image_url != '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY
